notes: This file is a discovery catalog generated from the live OpenCTI GraphQL schema.
Use mirror-sync/sync_scope.json as the runtime contract; keep this file as a candidate scope inventory.
Entries marked template_only require selection and projection review before they can be enabled safely.
Default acceptance-baseline scopes stay aligned with sync_scope.json and are mirrored below as enabled entries.
